---
title: "Research"
page-layout: full
---

## Methodology

### Preprints

::: {.publication}
#### Distributional Evaluation of Generative Models via Relative Density Ratio

::: {.pub-authors}
**Yuliang Xu**, Yun Wei, and Li Ma
:::

::: {.pub-meta}
2025 · Preprint · Under revision
:::

::: {.pub-links}
[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.25507) [Code](https://github.com/yuliangxu/RDR) [Package](https://yuliangxu.github.io/rdr-eval)
:::

::: {.pub-activity}
**Talks & posters** · **Stellar Abstract Award** Poster, STAI-X 2026 · Invited talk, PCIC 2026 · Invited talk, ICSA 2026
:::
:::

::: {.publication}
#### A tree-based kernel for densities and its applications in clustering DNase-seq profiles

::: {.pub-authors}
**Yuliang Xu**, Kaixuan Luo, and Li Ma
:::

::: {.pub-meta}
2025 · Preprint · Under revision
:::

::: {.pub-links}
[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.15480) [Code](https://github.com/yuliangxu/CorTree)
:::

::: {.pub-activity}
**Talks & posters** · Poster, Bayesian Nonparametrics (BNP 14), June 2025 · Invited talk, ICSA Applied Statistics Symposium, June 2025 · Invited talk, Michigan Biostatistics Brown Bag Seminar, 2025
:::
:::

::: {.publication}
#### Two-sample comparison through additive tree models for density ratios

::: {.pub-authors}
Naoki Awaya, **Yuliang Xu**, and Li Ma
:::

::: {.pub-meta}
2025 · Preprint · Under review
:::

::: {.pub-links}
[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.03059) [Code](https://github.com/MaStatLab/BATTS)
:::
:::

::: {.publication}
#### Matching for causal effects via multimarginal unbalanced optimal transport

::: {.pub-authors}
Florian Gunsilius and **Yuliang Xu**
:::

::: {.pub-meta}
2021 · Preprint · Under review
:::

::: {.pub-links}
[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2112.04398) [Code](https://github.com/yuliangxu/UOT)
:::
:::

### Publications

::: {.publication}
#### Bayesian Structured Mediation Analysis With Unobserved Confounders

::: {.pub-authors}
**Yuliang Xu**, Shu Yang, and Jian Kang
:::

::: {.pub-meta}
2026 · *Biometrics*, 82(2), ujag110
:::

::: {.pub-links}
[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.04142) [Publisher](https://doi.org/10.1093/biomtc/ujag110) [Code](https://github.com/yuliangxu/BASMU)
:::

::: {.pub-activity}
**Talks & posters** · Invited talk, Statistical Methods in Imaging (SMI), May 2025 · Poster, Duke StatsSci Research Alumni Symposium, November 2024
:::
:::

::: {.publication}
#### Scalable Bayesian Image-on-Scalar Regression for Population-Scale Neuroimaging Data Analysis

::: {.pub-authors}
**Yuliang Xu**, Timothy D. Johnson, Thomas E. Nichols, and Jian Kang
:::

::: {.pub-meta}
2026 · *Journal of the American Statistical Association*, Applications and Case Studies
:::

::: {.pub-links}
[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.13204) [Publisher](https://doi.org/10.1080/01621459.2026.2635067) [Code](https://github.com/yuliangxu/SBIOS)
:::

::: {.pub-activity}
**Talks & posters** · Topic-contributed talk, ENAR 2023
:::
:::

::: {.publication}
#### Bayesian Image Mediation Analysis

::: {.pub-authors}
**Yuliang Xu**, Timothy D. Johnson, Mary Heitzeg, and Jian Kang
:::

::: {.pub-meta}
2026 · *Journal of the American Statistical Association*, Theory and Methods
:::

::: {.pub-links}
[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.16284) [Publisher](https://doi.org/10.1080/01621459.2026.2613465) [Code](https://github.com/yuliangxu/BIMA)
:::

::: {.pub-activity}
**Talks & posters** · Topic-contributed talk, JSM 2022 · **ASA SBSS Student Paper Award**, 2023
:::
:::

::: {.publication}
#### Bayesian Image Regression with Soft-thresholded Conditional Autoregressive Prior

::: {.pub-authors}
**Yuliang Xu** and Jian Kang
:::

::: {.pub-meta}
2025 · *International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR)*
:::

::: {.pub-links}
[OpenReview](https://openreview.net/forum?id=rnL3OafDdw) [Publisher](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/hash/f418594e90047a10f4c158f70d6701cc-Abstract-Conference.html) [Code](https://github.com/yuliangxu/STCAR)
:::

::: {.pub-activity}
**Talks & posters** · Invited online talk, Statistics in Imaging Virtual Working Group, December 2025 · Poster, ICLR, April 2025 · Invited talk, SMI 2026
:::
:::

## Applications

::: {.publication .publication-compact}
#### Association of neighborhood socioeconomic status with outcomes in patients surviving stroke

Eric L. Stulberg, Erica Twardzik, Sehee Kim, Chia-Wei Hsu, **Yuliang Xu**, Philippa Clarke, Lewis B. Morgenstern, and Lynda D. Lisabeth

::: {.pub-meta}
2021 · *Neurology*, 96(21), e2599–e2610
:::
:::

::: {.publication .publication-compact}
#### Overnight rostral fluid shifts exacerbate obstructive sleep apnea after stroke

Devin L. Brown, Azadeh Yadollahi, Kevin He, **Yuliang Xu**, Bryan Piper, Erin Case, Ronald D. Chervin, and Lynda D. Lisabeth

::: {.pub-meta}
2021 · *Stroke*, 52(10), 3176–3183
:::
:::

::: {.publication .publication-compact}
#### mgee2: An R package for marginal analysis of longitudinal ordinal data with misclassified responses and covariates

**Yuliang Xu**, Shuo Shuo Liu, and Yi Grace Y.

::: {.pub-meta}
2021 · *The R Journal*, 13(2), 419
:::

::: {.pub-links}
[Publisher](https://journal.r-project.org/archive/2021/RJ-2021-093/RJ-2021-093.pdf)
:::
:::

::: {.publication .publication-compact}
#### Factors Contributing to Sex Differences in Health-Related Quality of Life After Ischemic Stroke: BASIC Project

Hoang T. Phan, Mathew J. Reeves, Seana Gall, Lewis B. Morgenstern, **Yuliang Xu**, and Lynda D. Lisabeth

::: {.pub-meta}
2022 · *Journal of the American Heart Association*, 11(17), e026123
:::
:::

::: {.publication .publication-compact}
#### The impact of sociality and affective valence on brain activation: A meta-analysis

Shir Atzil, Ajay B. Satpute, Jiahe Zhang, Michael H. Parrish, Holly Shablack, Jennifer K. MacCormack, Joseph Leshin, Srishti Goel, Jeffrey A. Brooks, Jian Kang, **Yuliang Xu**, Matan Cohen, and Kristen A. Lindquist

::: {.pub-meta}
2023 · *NeuroImage*, 268, 119879
:::

::: {.pub-links}
[Publisher](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S1053811923000289)
:::
:::
